title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you enjoy reading? What types of books do you prefer?
Do you think it's important to read newspapers or magazines regularly?
How do you prefer to learn new things – through videos, books or experience?
What's the last book you read? Did you enjoy it?
Do you prefer reading physical books or digital ones? Why?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think reading fiction is as valuable as reading non-fiction? Why?
How do you think digital reading is changing our relationship with books?
Is it important to read books in their original language if possible?
